championMaterial.description: Reach the Champion tier in ranked Showdown.

noIInTeam.description: Clear a co-op boss wave with each player's side scoring at least one KO and no allied faint.

formationBreaker.description: KO all three opposing active Pokémon with one spread move.

noSell.name: No Sell
noSell.description: Survive a super-effective hit at 1 HP, then KO that attacker before it acts again.

setupPayoff.description: Reach +6 in one stat and score 3 KOs with that Pokémon before it switches out.

chargeItToTheGame.name: Charge It to the Game
chargeItToTheGame.description: KO with a charging move after its user survived the charge turn at 25% HP or less.

theLongestTurn.name: The Longest Turn
theLongestTurn.description: Trigger 10 distinct move, ability, item, or field effects in one turn.

statusQuo.name: Status Quo
statusQuo.description: On Elite or Hell, defeat a boss after dealing no direct attack damage during the battle.

evictionNotice.description: Defeat 5 naturally occurring ghost trainers while Ghost Trainers is not active.

identityTheft.description: Defeat a ghost trainer while using at least one species that also appears on its snapshot team.

deadRinger.name: Dead Ringer

hellHouse.name: Hell House

tripleExorcism.name: Triple Exorcism
tripleExorcism.description: On Hell difficulty, win a triple battle against a ghost trainer with no allied faint.

areYouNotEntertained.description: Clear the Colosseum mystery gauntlet without an allied faint.

readTheFinePrint.description: Accept Giratina's bargain and then complete that full run.

delveTooDeep.name: Delve Too Deep
delveTooDeep.description: Clear the deepest tier of a delve mystery encounter.

strangerThanFiction.name: Stranger Than Fiction
strangerThanFiction.description: Resolve 15 distinct mystery encounter types across fresh events.

museumQuality.name: Museum Quality
museumQuality.description: Acquire 5 distinct relic types through fresh acquisitions.

blackFriday.name: Black Friday
blackFriday.description: Make a black-market purchase in 10 different runs.

biomeTourist.description: Make a purchase from 8 distinct biome-specific shop types across fresh visits.

goldenTicket.name: Golden Ticket
goldenTicket.description: Hatch a Legendary egg sourced from each of the four egg machines.

fusionDance.name: Fusion Dance
fusionDance.description: Defeat a boss with a fused Pokémon landing the winning KO.

presetJetSet.description: Win a boss wave with each of five different named Shiny Lab presets.

nameRecognition.name: Name Recognition

glassCannon.description: Complete a full run on Elite or Hell with Nuzlocke and Flip Stats active.

houseOfMirrors.name: House of Mirrors
houseOfMirrors.description: Complete a full run on Elite or Hell with Monocolor and Inverse active.

deadChannel.name: Dead Channel

trinityTest.name: Trinity Test
